title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HP India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HP India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
